description_long: This object consists of two potted plants placed on a wooden platform. The left plant is housed in a cylindrical, marble-textured pot, while the right plant is in a classic terracotta pot with a wide rim. Both plants have broad, green leaves with a simple, pointed shape and are planted in dark soil. The leaves are arranged in a layered, alternating pattern, giving the plants a lush and healthy appearance. The pots are unadorned, with the marble pot having a subtle veined pattern and the terracotta pot being plain. The overall setup suggests a decorative arrangement suitable for urban environments.
description: Two leafy green plants in plain marble and terracotta pots, set on a wooden platform. The plants have broad, pointed leaves and are potted in dark soil.
description_view_0: Front view showing both potted plants side by side, with the marble pot on the left and the terracotta pot on the right.
description_view_1: Left-angled view highlighting the marble pot in the foreground and the terracotta pot slightly behind.
description_view_2: Rear view with the terracotta pot more prominent and the marble pot partially obscured.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the leafy tops of both plants, with pots mostly hidden.
